title: Lattice kinetic Monte Carlo model to simulate RNA polymerase II clusters
author: Klingberg, Tim
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This data set includes Python scripts (numerical simulation and analysis) and already generated simulation data for RNA polymerase II clusters. RNA polymerase II particles as single lattice sites and chromatin with regulatory region as connected polymer.
steps_raw: This data set includes Python scripts (numerical simulation and analysis) and already generated simulation data for RNA polymerase II clusters. RNA polymerase II particles as single lattice sites and chromatin with regulatory region as connected polymer.
